name: Expansion Quests
description: Dynamic quest system for creating interactive MMO-like quests with objectives, rewards, and NPC quest givers.
overview:
Expansion Quests is a dynamic quest system that brings MMO-like quest experiences to DayZ. Server owners can create interactive quests with various objective types, configurable rewards, and NPC quest givers placed around the map.

## Key Features

- **Multiple Objective Types** — Kill targets, collect items, deliver items, travel to locations, craft items, and more
- **Quest Chains** — Link quests together with pre-quest and follow-up quest requirements
- **Repeatable & Timed Quests** — Configure daily, weekly, or infinitely repeatable quests
- **NPC Quest Givers** — Place and configure NPC characters that offer and receive quests
- **Group Quests** — Create quests that can be shared and completed as a group
- **Configurable Rewards** — Define item rewards, currency rewards, and reputation rewards

> **Note:** This system is under active development. Content and configuration may change in future updates.
installation: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @ExpansionQuests to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start the server to generate quest configuration files.
Configure quest NPCs, objectives, and rewards. Restart the server.

troubleshooting.solution: Verify EnableQuests is set to 1, quest files are valid JSON, and quest NPC positions are correct.

troubleshooting.problem: Quest NPC markers not on map
troubleshooting.solution: Set CreateQuestNPCMarkers to 1 and ensure the Navigation mod is installed.
Check DailyResetHour and UseUTCTime settings. Server must be running at reset time.

useCases.title: PvE Progression
useCases.description: Create quest chains that guide players through progressively harder objectives, from simple item collection to dangerous AI encounters.

useCases.title: Daily Challenges
useCases.description: Set up repeatable daily quests that give players reasons to log in every day.

useCases.title: Story-Driven Server
useCases.description: Build narrative quest lines with multiple NPCs, branching paths, and story-based rewards.

quickSettings.name: EnableQuests
quickSettings.description: Master toggle to enable or disable the entire quest system.

quickSettings.name: EnableQuestLogTab
quickSettings.description: Show the quest log tab in the player's book menu.

quickSettings.name: CreateQuestNPCMarkers
quickSettings.description: Automatically create map markers at quest NPC locations.

quickSettings.name: UseUTCTime
quickSettings.description: Use UTC time for daily/weekly quest resets instead of server local time.

quickSettings.name: WeeklyResetDay
quickSettings.description: Day of the week (1=Monday, 7=Sunday) when weekly quests reset.

useCases.description: Build narrative quest lines with multiple NPCs, branching paths, and story-based rewards.

## Key Features

- **Multiple Objective Types** — Kill targets, collect items, deliver items, travel to locations, craft items, and more

- **Repeatable & Timed Quests** — Configure daily, weekly, or infinitely repeatable quests

steps: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @ExpansionQuests to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start the server to generate quest configuration files.
Configure quest NPCs, objectives, and rewards. Restart the server.

useCases.title: Quests not appearing for players
useCases.description: Verify EnableQuests is set to 1, quest files are valid JSON, and quest NPC positions are correct.

useCases.title: Quest NPC markers not on map
useCases.description: Set CreateQuestNPCMarkers to 1 and ensure the Navigation mod is installed.

useCases.title: Daily quests not resetting
useCases.description: Check DailyResetHour and UseUTCTime settings. Server must be running at reset time.
